hero.headline: Websites built to attract clients and grow with your business
hero.subtitle: High-end websites built to convert. AI workflow automations when you're ready to scale.

items.title: 10+ Years of Excellence
items.desc: Together, we bring over a decade of hands-on experience as software developers at top Swiss companies — combining technical expertise with design clarity.

items.title: AI, Google & Speed Optimized
items.desc: Built for accessibility, reliability, and visibility across search engines and AI platforms so your business gets found everywhere clients look.

items.title: 5 Hours of Maintenance
items.desc: Your Webflow website runs smoothly with automatic updates and no plugins to manage, so you can focus on your business.

items.title: Direct Collaboration
items.desc: Work directly with the founders for clear communication and consistent quality.

items.title: 24/7 Time Savings
items.desc: Intelligent AI automations handle repetitive tasks around the clock, freeing you to focus on what really matters.

items.title: Easy Updates
items.desc: Once your site is live, you’ll have full control. Editing content is simple and intuitive.

services.title: Practical Solutions That Move Your Business Forward

items.title: Web Design
items.desc: We design and build responsive, SEO-optimized websites tailored to your business goals. From branding to launch, we handle everything so you can focus on running your business. Includes a custom CMS, SSL, hosting support, and 5 hours of monthly maintenance.

items.title: Workflow Automation
items.desc: We build smart automations using tools like n8n, Make, and Zapier to save you hours of manual work each week. From lead capture to invoicing, we connect your tools and streamline your processes so your business runs smoothly in the background.

stories.title: Our Story
stories.text: Before founding Moniré, we met as frontend developers at brack.ch, one of Switzerland's largest online retailers. Our paths to tech were unconventional—consulting, HR, and veterinary medicine—and we realized these diverse backgrounds were our shared strength. We don't just write code; we understand business challenges from multiple angles. That's why we founded Moniré: to partner with businesses who need more than technical skills, but genuine care and investment in their growth.

stories.title: Why Choose A Duo?
stories.text: A small team means you're never just a number. With us, you get direct access to senior-level expertise and a passionate duo who genuinely care about your success. As working mothers, we structure our work around efficiency and impact, ensuring every decision delivers real value for our clients.

stories.title: Giving Back
stories.text: Every year, we support one non-profit or meaningful initiative with a complimentary design or development project. Know an organization that could benefit?

custom.title: Need Something More Specific?
custom.desc: Every business is unique. If our packages don't quite fit, we'll create a custom solution tailored to your specific needs and budget.

projects.title: Snip Squad
projects.desc: A vibrant veterinary clinic website designed to be warm, approachable, and easy to navigate for pet owners.

projects.title: SystemicAlly
projects.desc: Corporate leadership development platform with a clean, professional design emphasizing trust and expertise.

projects.title: Towarowa 41
projects.desc: An elegant luxury apartment listing with editorial photography and refined typography.

items.q: How long does it take to build a website?
items.a: Typically 4–8 weeks depending on the project scope. We'll give you a clear timeline during our discovery call.

items.q: Do I need to provide content?
items.a: It helps if you have content ready, but we can guide you through the process and help with copywriting if needed.

items.q: What platform do you build on?
items.a: We primarily use modern frameworks like React and Next.js, along with headless CMS solutions. We choose the best stack for your specific needs.

items.q: Can I update the website myself?
items.a: Absolutely! Every website comes with a user-friendly CMS. We also provide training so you feel confident making updates.
Yes, our Advanced and Premium plans include monthly maintenance hours. We also offer standalone support packages.

items.q: What if I need changes after launch?
items.a: We offer flexible support options. Small changes are often covered by maintenance hours, and larger updates can be quoted separately.

footer.tagline: Websites built to attract clients and grow with your business.
